description: You are a Clinical Data Manager preparing the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024) for an interim analysis data cut. Several subjects' 'Baseline Assessment' events are stuck in the 'Data Entry Started' state because site coordinators did not formally mark the events as complete. Log in to OpenClinica (username: root / password: Admin123!) and update the 'Baseline Assessment' event status to 'Completed' for subjects DM-101, DM-103, and DM-105. Do not modify the status for DM-102 or DM-104.
